---
name: 📝 Documentation update
about: Request an update, addition, or improvement to the documentation
title: ''
labels: 'documentation'
assignees: ''

---

**What documentation needs updating?**
Specify the page, section, or file that needs changes.

**What changes are needed?**
Describe what should be added, updated, or removed.

**Why is this change needed?**
Explain why the current documentation is incomplete, outdated, or unclear.

**Suggested content (optional)**
If you have draft text or an outline for the update, include it here.

**Additional context**
Add any other context or references about the documentation update here.
